</span><b style="font-size: 14px;">Continuous 1</b><span style="font-size: 14px;"> et </span><b style="font-size: 14px;">Continuous 2</b><span style="font-size: 14px;"> s'exécutent en continue sans bloquer.</span></font>" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;align=left;size=18;perimeterSpacing=0;spacing=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1392" y="401.5" width="300" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="<font style="font-size: 18px;"><b style="">2</b> -</font><font style="font-size: 14px;"> <b>Tick interrupt </b>se déclenche (t2) il met en pause <b>Continuous 1</b> (état <b>"<span style="color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); font-family: monospace; font-size: 0px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">%3CmxGraphModel%3E%3Croot%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%222%22%20value%3D%22%26lt%3Bfont%20style%3D%26quot%3Bfont-size%3A%2014px%3B%26quot%3B%26gt%3B1%20-%20Task%201%20et%20Task%202%20s'ex%C3%A9cutent%20en%20continue%20sans%20bloquer.%26lt%3B%2Ffont%26gt%3B%22%20style%3D%22shape%3Dnote%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3BbackgroundOutline%3D1%3BdarkOpacity%3D0.05%3Balign%3Dleft%3Bsize%3D18%3BperimeterSpacing%3D0%3Bspacing%3D8%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20x%3D%221430%22%20y%3D%2240%22%20width%3D%22300%22%20height%3D%22100%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3C%2Froot%3E%3C%2FmxGraphModel%""3E""""</span>Ready"</b>) sélectionne <b>Continuous&nbsp;2</b> (Round-Robin) pour lui donner la main.</font>" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;align=left;size=18;perimeterSpacing=0;spacing=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1410" y="720" width="300" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="<font style="font-size: 18px;"><b>3</b></font><font style="font-size: 14px;"> - <b>Tick</b> <b>interrupt</b> se déclenche de nouveau (t3) il donne la main à <b>Continuous&nbsp;1</b> et met en pause <b>Continuous&nbsp;2</b>. Ce processus se répète tant que d'autres tâches de priorité supérieure n'entre pas en jeux.</font>" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;align=left;size=18;perimeterSpacing=0;spacing=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1740" y="720" width="300" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="<font style="font-size: 18px;"><b>5</b></font><font style="font-size: 14px;"> - <b>Periodic</b> se bloque.&nbsp;<b>Continuous 1</b> est choisie pour prendre la main.&nbsp; &nbsp;</font>" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;align=left;size=18;perimeterSpacing=0;spacing=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1770" y="401.5" width="300" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="<font style=""><b style=""><font style="font-size: 18px;">4 </font></b><span style="font-size: 14px;">- </span><b style="font-size: 14px;">Periodic</b><span style="font-size: 14px;"> se débloque (son délais d'attente est expiré).&nbsp;</span><b style="font-size: 14px;">Continuous 2</b><span style="font-size: 14px;"> (priorité inférieure) est mise en attente.&nbsp; &nbsp;</span></font>" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;align=left;size=18;perimeterSpacing=0;spacing=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1578" y="331.5" width="300" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 286px; height: 1px; padding-top: 106px; margin-left: 60px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 286px; height: 1px; padding-top: 439px; margin-left: 78px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font: Tick interrupt se déclenche (t2) il met en pause Continuous 1 (état "%3CmxGraphModel%3E%3Croot%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%220%22%2F%3E%3CmxCell%20id%3D%222%22%20value%3D%22%26lt%3Bfont%20style%3D%26quot%3Bfont-size%3A%2014px%3B%26quot%3B%26gt%3B1%20-%20Task%201%20et%20Task%202%20s'ex%C3%A9cutent%20en%20continue%20sans%20bloquer.%26lt%3B%2Ffont%26gt%3B%22%20style%3D%22shape%3Dnote%3BwhiteSpace%3Dwrap%3Bhtml%3D1%3BbackgroundOutline%3D1%3BdarkOpacity%3D0.05%3Balign%3Dleft%3Bsize%3D18%3BperimeterSpacing%3D0%3Bspacing%3D8%3B%22%20vertex%3D%221%22%20parent%3D%221%22%3E%3CmxGeometry%20x%3D%221430%22%20y%3D%2240%22%20width%3D%22300%22%20height%3D%22100%22%20as%3D%22geometry%22%2F%3E%3C%2FmxCell%3E%3C%2Froot%3E%3C%2FmxGraphModel%""3E""""Ready") sélectionne Continuous 2 (Round-Robin) pour lui donner la main.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 286px; height: 1px; padding-top: 439px; margin-left: 408px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font: - Tick interrupt se déclenche de nouveau (t3) il donne la main à Continuous 1 et met en pause Continuous 2. Ce processus se répète tant que d'autres tâches de priorité supérieure n'entre pas en jeux.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 286px; height: 1px; padding-top: 116px; margin-left: 438px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font: - Periodic se bloque. Continuous 1 est choisie pour prendre la main.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 286px; height: 1px; padding-top: 46px; margin-left: 246px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.span: se débloque (son délais d'attente est expiré).
